title: Handbuch Package Documentation Metadata
description: Schema for curated documentation metadata entries in the handbuch.cloud library. Each JSON file represents a single open-source package and its hand-picked documentation sources.

name.description: Package name exactly as published in the registry (e.g. 'react', '@effect-ts/core').

registry.description: The package registry this package is published on.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last time this metadata entry was updated.

checkedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last time the URLs in this entry were verified reachable.

readme.description: Direct URL to the package's README.md (raw Markdown preferred). Used as a fallback when no curated docs are registered.

docs.description: Curated documentation sources for this package, ordered by quality and relevance. Highest-quality sources first.

url.description: Canonical URL of the documentation source.

title.description: Short human-readable title for the documentation source.

description.description: One- or two-sentence summary of what this source covers and why it is useful.

kind.description: The kind of documentation source. 'official' is reserved for first-party docs maintained by the project authors.

tags.description: Optional tags for filtering and search. Common values: guide, api, reference, tutorial, beginner, advanced, examples, migration.
